TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Teodoro_Obiang_Nguema_Mbasogo, title = Teodoro_Obiang_Nguema_Mbasogo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Teodoro_Obiang_Nguema_Mbasogo} }

S.FORM: Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 6, Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Equatorial guinea ta' misuw hya' ga Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 1979 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 6, Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw Equatorial guinea ta' misuw hya' ga Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 1979 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: teo*oro oβiaŋ ŋuema mβas~ɕoɣo rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, teo*oro oβiaŋ ŋuema mβas~ɕoɣo, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw equatorial ɣuinea taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa teo*oro oβiaŋ ŋuema mβas~ɕoɣo, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
